purpose: Casting-round-two auditions awaiting director by-ear selection

roles.speaker: DRILLMASTER
roles.context: A five-bark pool heard across the parade ground: projected cadence in French, German, and deliberately broken English. These are dramatized commands, not attributed quotations.
roles.reviewCriterion: Choose by projection, clipped cadence, intelligibility through wind, and a German vocal identity that remains credible after positional rolloff; reject modern action-game swagger.

candidates.label: A — Commander Blake
candidates.libraryMetadata: German; male; middle-aged; raspy; professional character voice
candidates.tradeoff: The only slate voice recorded in German, and its weathered rasp may survive the wind bed naturally, but its battle-tested color may overstate violence in a scene about learning and endurance.

candidates.label: B — Jerry B.
candidates.sourceName: Jerry B. - Military Commander | Gruff, Gritty Authority
candidates.libraryMetadata: American; male; middle-aged; intense; professional character voice
candidates.tradeoff: A hard test of whether v3 can carry the multilingual lines with drill clarity, but the American vocal base and modern military profile may disqualify it by ear.

candidates.label: C — Rob
candidates.libraryMetadata: British; male; middle-aged; rough; professional character voice
candidates.tradeoff: Calloused texture offers a less game-like command comparison, but the British vocal base must not be mistaken for the required German identity.

roles.speaker: OFFICER
roles.context: Two movement-two instructions immediately before the Redoubt 10 advance. These are dramatized commands, not attributed quotations.
roles.reviewCriterion: Choose by audible breath, urgency held below speaking volume, terse command authority, and clarity at close range; reject narration, seduction, or horror color.

candidates.label: A — Low-Voice Confidant
candidates.libraryMetadata: English; male-presenting; late thirties; quiet, intimate, breath-present generated voice
candidates.tradeoff: The most naturally breath-present and close option, but its gentle personal cadence may resist terse military authority.

candidates.label: B — Brian
candidates.libraryMetadata: American; male; middle-aged; resonant; premade voice
candidates.tradeoff: Mature resonance could retain clarity at whisper volume, but the comforting base may turn the instruction into calm narration.

candidates.label: C — Callum
candidates.libraryMetadata: American; male; middle-aged; husky; premade character voice
candidates.tradeoff: Husky texture may make the command feel physically suppressed, but its unsettling edge risks importing thriller color into the assault.
